results.title: Mailpit
results.description: Mailpit is an SMTP server and web interface for developers to test and view intercepted emails. It provides a modern UI, a REST API for integration testing, and features like HTML/spam checks and fast message processing.

results.title: Mailpit
results.description: Mailpit is a small, fast, low memory, zero-dependency email testing tool & API for developers. It acts as an SMTP server, providing a web interface to view captured emails and an API for automated integration testing.

results.title: Mailpit
results.description: Mailpit is a fast, low-memory, zero-dependency email testing tool and API for developers, offering a modern web interface to view and test captured emails.

results.title: MailKit
results.description: MailKit is a cross-platform mail client library for .NET, built on MimeKit, offering robust support for IMAP, POP3, and SMTP protocols with various authentication and proxy features.

results.title: MimeKit
results.description: MimeKit is a C# library for creating and parsing MIME (Multipurpose Internet Mail Extension) messages according to IETF specifications, offering high-performance email message handling.

results.title: Lettermint
results.description: Lettermint is a European email service provider specializing in transactional, broadcast, and inbound emails, offering GDPR-compliant services with its own EU infrastructure, high deliverability, and developer-friendly APIs for various integration needs.

results.title: Python MailChimp
results.description: A straightforward Python client for Mailchimp's v3 API, built with the requests library, offering support for authentication, pagination, and field selection.

results.title: Send
results.description: :mailbox_with_mail: Simple, private file sharing. Mirror of https://gitlab.com/timvisee/send

results.title: Unwrapit
results.description: Unwrapit provides a graceful and intuitive way to handle errors in JavaScript and TypeScript applications.

results.title: Mailtm
results.description: MailTM is an asynchronous API wrapper for the mail.tm service, providing functionality to interact with temporary email accounts and messages.

results.title: Mailparser
results.description: Mail Parser is a Python library that transforms raw emails into versatile Python objects, supporting standard RFC headers, attachments, and Outlook (.msg) formats.

results.title: Mail Parser
results.description: Mail Parser is a Rust library that fully conforms to Internet Message Format and MIME standards, offering a human-friendly representation of email contents with a focus on performance and memory safety.

results.title: MailMate
results.description: MailMate is an email client that uniquely focuses on a plain text editor, using Markdown to generate rich text emails, and offers extensive features for email organization, searching, and customization including IMAP account management, smart mailboxes, and advanced threading.

results.title: MailMimeParser
results.description: An email parser written in PHP

results.title: Mail Parser
results.description: Mail Parser is a fast and robust e-mail parsing library for Rust.

results.title: Mailcatcher
results.description: MailCatcher is a simple SMTP server that catches emails and displays them in a web interface, allowing developers to test email functionality locally.

results.title: Mailgun
results.description: Mailgun is a cloud-based email API service that enables developers to send, receive, and track emails programmatically.

results.title: Mailtrap
results.description: Mailtrap is an Elixir API client with Bamboo adapters for interacting with Mailtrap Sandbox and Mailtrap Sending APIs.

results.title: Mailosaur Python
results.description: Mailosaur is a Python library for automating email and SMS testing, offering unlimited test email addresses, end-to-end testing capabilities, and fake SMTP servers for staging environments.

results.title: Mint
results.description: Mint is an Elixir library providing process-less HTTP/1.1 and HTTP/2 client connections, offering data structures and functions for handling HTTP communication.

results.title: Mail-in-a-Box
results.description: Mail-in-a-Box is a one-click deployable mail server that helps individuals take back control of their email by providing a complete SMTP, IMAP, and webmail solution with integrated security, DNS management, and backup features.

results.title: Mailmodo (llmstxt)
results.description: Mailmodo is an email marketing platform that helps businesses create, send, and automate engaging emails with AI-powered tools, interactive widgets, and advanced analytics.

results.title: MailSlurp
results.description: MailSlurp is a powerful API platform for creating and controlling email and phone number accounts, enabling developers to send, receive, and automate communications in code and no-code environments.

results.title: MCP Mailtrap Server
results.description: An MCP server that provides tools for sending transactional emails and managing email templates via Mailtrap, integrating with AI clients like Claude Desktop and Cursor.

results.title: Mailtrap Python Client
results.description: This Python package provides an official client for the Mailtrap API, enabling quick integration of email sending functionality into Python applications for both transactional and bulk streams, as well as email testing and other Mailtrap services.

results.title: Pymailtm
results.description: PyMailTm is a command-line interface and Python web API wrapper for mail.tm, providing a fast and insecure temporary email account generator.

results.title: MessageKit
results.description: MessageKit is a community-driven UI framework designed to simplify the integration of beautiful and customizable chat interfaces into iOS applications, serving as a modern replacement for JSQMessagesViewController.

results.title: Maigret
results.description: Maigret is an open-source OSINT tool that collects a dossier on a person by username, checking for accounts across a vast number of sites and extracting available public information without requiring API keys.

results.title: Mailinator
results.description: Mailinator is an email system for system and automation testing, offering public and private domains to receive and manage emails via web, API, SMS, and webhooks, designed for developers and testers.

results.title: Piler
results.description: Piler is an open-source email archival application with features including a built-in SMTP server, retention and legal hold rules, message deduplication, encryption, full-text search, and various authentication and export options.
